meaning: 费迪皮迪兹(公元前5世纪的雅典长跑运动员)
examples: Being too keen to win can have dangerous consequences: remember that Pheidippides, the first marathon runner, dropped dead seconds after saying: "Rejoice, we conquer!"
The game is inspired in the tale of Pheidippides.
Legend has it that Pheidippides, the first person to run a marathon in ancient Greece, died as a result of the strain.
In 490BC the military messenger Pheidippides ran to Athens from the battle of Marathon to announce victory over the Persians.
Each marathon course was approximately twenty-five miles, believed to be the length of the route from Marathon to Athens run by Pheidippides in 490 B.
